programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: The 60�s had The Supremes, and the 80�s had The Pointer Sisters. But when it came to impactful �girl groups�, the 1970�s were ruled by The Emotions. Wanda, Sheila and Jeanette Hutchinson had it all; beauty, glamour, and harmonizing voices that set the industry on fire. After growing up as local gospel stars in Chicago, they first made their mark on the national scene at Stax Records. But when they joined forces with the legendary Maurice White of Earth, Wind & Fire, songs like �Best of My Love�, �Don�t Ask My Neighbor� and �Boogie Wonderland� made them household names. Bad business deals, family tragedies and financial troubles changed the game. But by putting family first, the Emotions have survived to tell their tale on this special episode of �Unsung

programme.desc: The Jones Girls, a trio of sisters with some of the silkiest harmonies in the history of soul. Shirley Jones opens up about the journey she shared with her sisters in their rise to soul fame and how she is still carrying on the legacy today.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Fantasia grew up in a family that focused heavily on singing.Becoming a young teenage mother solidified her relationship with God. It was by chance that her neighborhood pushed her to try out for, and win, American Idol.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Jermaine Dupri’s career started as a 12 year old dancer. He quickly went on to become a successful record producer by the age of 16. Looking back on his accolades, he earned the right to be talked among the greatest songwriters of all time.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: With five gold albums and sixteen top forty singles, Con Funk Shun strode across the funk and R&B scene like a colossus for more than a decade. From their roots as high-school friends in Vallejo, California, they honed their chops at Stax records in Memphis, while developing an irrepressibly danceable sound. With hits like �Ffun,� �Shake & Dance With Me,� �Chase Me,� and �Love�s Train,� the group performed in sold-out arenas around the country, while showing off lavish outfits and tightly choreographed moves. But after 17 years together, a succession of personal conflicts caused the band to fall apart. And a decade later, one their founding members was killed in circumstances at once mysterious and chilling. For this episode, the remaining original members, along with family and friends, gather for the first time to tell the story of a truly �Unsung� band

programme.title: Unsung

programme.title: Rickey Smiley For Real
programme.desc: Rickey’s non-existent love life is the topic at the radio station. Seeking advice from friend and advisor, Spirit, Rickey gets the real about balance and having unrealistic expectations with women.

programme.title: Rickey Smiley For Real
programme.desc: Rickey, Da Brat, and Gary get acting lessons from an eccentric acting coach. Later, Da Brat "blind-sides" Rickey by setting him up on a blind date with a lady football player. Brandon decides he wants Rickey to invest in his business.

programme.title: We're The Campbells
programme.desc: Erica flies to Dallas to do her radio show and goes a little too far on air with her cohost, Griff, and then questions the higher-ups about policy. After talking to MC Lyte, Joi decides to leave Warryn�s label. Goo gets some great news.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and the guys take on a rare and valuable American street machine with big hopes for bringing it to this year's SEMA Convention in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny's friend Brian has always wanted to ride a motorcycle, but has never been able due to his physical limitations.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny is visited by legendary Mistress of the Dark, Elvira, whose famous Thunderbird is in need of some mechanical magic.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin and Horny Mike make an unauthorized purchase, forcing Danny to teach them a valuable lesson. Later, Danny runs into trouble himself after acquiring a Chevelle.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Scott bugs out when he learns Danny's invested in a vintage dune buggy. Will Danny prove Scott wrong and flip this sand shredder for some serious dough?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and Horny Mike get too close for comfort when they convince a Model-T Hot Rod owner to let them take it for a spin. Later, a Soap Box race car brings out the inner child in Roli and Mike.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny tries to score an ex-police motorcycle without getting busted, while a watermain break threatens to put the shop permanently under water.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has a last-minute change of heart and can't let go of a classic car he promised to sell to a loyal customer.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin's brother is a judge, but that won't get him a free ride, and the guys struggle to finish his '62 Chevy pick-up within budget.

programme.desc: When the World Series of Poker guys want a Count's Kustoms chopper as the ultimate online giveaway, Danny is determined to make it something special.

programme.desc: Danny takes on his most emotional project yet after spotting a 70 Dodge Challenger on a private road.

programme.desc: A customer wants to trick out his 2004 Harley Davidson Road Glide, but both Shannon and Ryan aren't sure they can do everything he wants.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and the guys take on a rare and valuable American street machine with big hopes for bringing it to this year's SEMA Convention in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny's friend Brian has always wanted to ride a motorcycle, but has never been able due to his physical limitations.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny is visited by legendary Mistress of the Dark, Elvira, whose famous Thunderbird is in need of some mechanical magic.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin and Horny Mike make an unauthorized purchase, forcing Danny to teach them a valuable lesson. Later, Danny runs into trouble himself after acquiring a Chevelle.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Scott bugs out when he learns Danny's invested in a vintage dune buggy. Will Danny prove Scott wrong and flip this sand shredder for some serious dough?

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: A storm's brewing over the Swamp Man and it's threatening to wash away his hopes of filling a huge order; Gabe deals with the aftermath of Aiden's mutiny; the Chapman crew's behind after they burned through their money chasing the Lost Logging Train.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In Washington, three generations of Rygaard loggers are fighting for the crown; Papack Alaska Logging moves into their final section; Gary and Eddie see if their swamp logging gamble has paid off.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Papac Logging is barely holding onto their lead; the Rygaards will have to work as a team if they're gonna reclaim the title; Shelby Stanga's under the gun, but has a secret map to a possible stash of sunken logs.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Industry titans Pihl Logging and Rygaard Logging tackle some of their most challenging jobs yet; Frank Harkness makes a name for himself; Buckin' Billy Ray takes to the treetops of Vancouver Island, risking his life to keep other people safe.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: As Papac Alaska goes deeper into their seven thousand acre site, Joe and Coatsy devise a plan of attack for the next section of this massive project; Rygaard Logging is fighting to get the wood out; Gary and Eddie need to step up their game.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The Papac crew is moving on to the most remote and treacherous site of their season; the money is drying up for Greg Chapman and his crew is seeing red; Gary and Eddie's new venture is becoming a nightmare.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Mike Papac has to step in as Joe and Coatsey's arguments threaten to bring the job to a grinding halt; David Zitterkopf's back to work after an injury that threatened to end his season.

programme.desc: A signed first edition of The Wonderful Wizard of Oz comes into the shop; Corey goes to look at a one-of-a-kind Turbo Drive II arcade game; Rick hunts for a package that was supposedly delivered to him.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Corey arrives at work with an injured hand and ankle; an oil painting by Jim Daly is brought into the shop; a guy brings in a custom built Harley Davidson rat bike.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A 1973 Marshall Amp; a hover-board from the movie, "Back to the Future Part II," signed by the cast.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A D. Moore pistol from the Civil War is brought into the shop; the guys check out a signed picture of President Benjamin Harrison; the guys put together a team to compete in a quiz competition.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Bullet shells from John Dillinger's final robbery get caught in the shop; Rick and Corey attempt to make a drive by deal on a vintage Schwinn Whizzer from 1947.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane" to different places.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After discovering that Martin has to miss a Friday night poker game for a planned date, the guys (as well as their wives) take turns figuring out the best way to coach him for romance.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys realize that Godwin has never really asked them for a favor, even though they are all always helping each other out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Due to construction at Jase and Missy's house, Willie and Korie invite Jase and the kids to live with them while Missy is out of town visiting friends.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from--Godwin's House.

programme.title: Best of #6
programme.desc: A compilation of the best scenes from all 11 seasons of A&E's hit series Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms.Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertsons host a Halloween event at Duck Commander, where they all come together to transform the warehouse into a "scarehouse."

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A compilation of the best scenes from all 11 seasons of A&E's hit series Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Rebecca returns home from her internship in Los Angeles, the Robertson family plans a big surprise party to welcome her back.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie is looking to hire a new assistant, Korie insists he interview her cousin, JD. Willie is hesitant at first, but immediately hits it off with JD, who truly appreciates Willie's sense of humor.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After seeing footage Jep shot using a GoPro, Si decides he wants to use the camera to record a day in his life. But when Si gets on the guys nerves while they're hunting, they kick him and his GoPros out of the blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work.

programme.desc: Dalton rookie Ray Veilleux drives into a trucker's worst nightmare when he's distracted for a split-second.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog usually takes his job personally, but this time a case really hits home. First, he and Beth receive a special gift--a painting of Dog's recently deceased daughter, Barbara Katy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive, doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of methamphetamine when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has problems when he goes to a small town on the Big Island of Hawaii to track down a fugitive. In a small town, everyone knows everyone else's business, making it impossible for Dog to hunt in secret.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation. In a teary heart-to-heart talk, Dog finds out that Jonaven's father was killed in a shoot-out with police when Jonaven was only 9. Dog then

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes that the family that plays together stays together. But what happens when a family's idea of fun is getting high and running amuck? Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It takes years to become a seasoned bondsman, and the tenderfoot Alysin has a lot to learn. She not only bailed out a man facing charges of theft on just his promise to pay the fee but also without a co-signer for his bond.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men; one has a taste for larceny, the other for strong sprits, both have a bad bad habit of missing their court dates.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Colorado helping a fellow bondsmen clean up his files. The target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver, Colorado. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business, and the simmering tensions come to a head when Duane Lee is accused of denting Dog's SUV.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a young man with a taste for trouble. He's fled to Texas but with his family's house on the line Dog is willing to try a risky strategy. He enlists the family in an elaborate hoax to lure the runner home.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law. She's didn't come to court to answer charges that

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team search for Jonah, a violent and desperate criminal facing 20 years in jail. The trail goes stale when Dog runs into evasive family members and an angry girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive's sketchy associates and footloose ways spell trouble for Dog in today's hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law. She's didn't come to court to answer charges that

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team search for Jonah, a violent and desperate criminal facing 20 years in jail. The trail goes stale when Dog runs into evasive family members and an angry girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive's sketchy associates and footloose ways spell trouble for Dog in today's hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes that the family that plays together stays together. But what happens when a family's idea of fun is getting high and running amuck? Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It takes years to become a seasoned bondsman, and the tenderfoot Alysin has a lot to learn. She not only bailed out a man facing charges of theft on just his promise to pay the fee but also without a co-signer for his bond.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men; one has a taste for larceny, the other for strong sprits, both have a bad bad habit of missing their court dates.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Colorado helping a fellow bondsmen clean up his files. The target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver, Colorado. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business, and the simmering tensions come to a head when Duane Lee is accused of denting Dog's SUV.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission--to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team, and Leland is feeling caught in the middle. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision tempers flare.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound or make it worse?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In a last ditch attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk hold the keys to bringing him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken that looks like a dragon, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia.

programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks but that's not the case with "Dog" Chapman. To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook!

programme.title: Murderous Affairs
programme.desc: A husband carefully plans a murder; a love triangle leads to a deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Murderous Affairs
programme.desc: Love and lust leads to murders in Atlanta and Colorado.

programme.title: Murderous Affairs
programme.desc: A church minister and a teacher fall for a student.

programme.title: Murderous Affairs
programme.desc: A pregnant wife is killed execution style; an EMT is intent on taking a life.

programme.title: Murderous Affairs
programme.desc: A Kentucky airline pilot is murdered for money; in the UK, a former pro-golfer is attacked by his wife's lover.

programme.title: Murderous Affairs
programme.desc: In Washington, a husband goes missing; killer swingers in the UK.

programme.title: Corrupt Crimes
programme.desc: A homegrown terrorism group plans a jihad in Southern California; a U.S. representative scams investors out of millions of dollars.

programme.title: Corrupt Crimes
programme.desc: A 51-day standoff between federal agents and cult leader David Koresh ends in a fiery tragedy.

programme.title: Corrupt Crimes
programme.desc: An armored-car driver leads a team in a brazen heist, stealing more than $17 million from his employer; a Wall Street swindler destroys hundreds of lives.

programme.title: Corrupt Crimes
programme.desc: Hours after robbing a bank, a teen culprit brags about it on YouTube; a promising biopharmaceutical company becomes a stock market predator.

programme.title: Corrupt Crimes
programme.desc: Pete Rose is banned from baseball; the governor of Illinois finds himself living behind bars.

programme.title: Corrupt Crimes
programme.desc: Pennsylvania judges unjustly throw thousands of children into juvenile detention centers in exchange for millions of dollars in kickbacks; Olympian Marion Jones denies doping.

programme.title: Accomplice to Murder, With Vinnie Politan
programme.desc: The murder of hometown hero and NBA star Lorenzen Wright remained unsolved until alleged accomplice Jimmy Martin revealed the location of the murder weapon, implicating Wright's ex-wife Sherra and her yardman Billy Ray Turner.

programme.title: Accomplice to Murder, With Vinnie Politan
programme.desc: In a modern-day tale of Romeo & Juliet with a Florida twist, high schoolers Courtney Schulhoff & Michael Morin found solace in each other amidst a tumultuous family life. When their families force them apart the couple's desperation turns deadly.

programme.title: Accomplice to Murder, With Vinnie Politan
programme.desc: In the peaceful village of Essex Junction, Vermont, Michael Durenleau's life would be cut short with a knife through the heart in the darkness behind Veronica's Tavern after celebratory drinks with his wife Rebecca.

programme.title: Someone They Knew With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Following the path from victim to verdict and exploring how, when it comes to murder, it is rare for there to be no prior connection between the killer and the deceased.

programme.title: Someone They Knew With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Bonny Lee Bakley had nine husbands before she meets former "Baretta" star Robert Blake, and he would be her last; as she waits for Blake outside a Los Angeles restaurant, someone approaches her car and shoots her in the head.

programme.title: Someone They Knew With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: David Coffin's house burned down with him in it, but it wasn't the fire that killed him, it was the bullet in his head; investigators immediately focused on Scott Davis, the estranged husband of Coffin's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: Rebecca Keller and Keri Murphy murdered Murphy's mother after she did not approve of their high school relationship; in her first TV interview ever, Keller explains to David Scott her role in the killing and even tries to justify why she did it.

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: It was a love triangle that turned deadly. In 2009, a Florida teenager stabbed her teenaged love rival over an ex-boyfriend, and the case had people across the country glued to the televised trial.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In the investigation of the murder of a one-time millionaire, both his ex-wife and his son are suspects.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Dorothy Lee Barnett on how she fled the United States with her daughter, eluding the FBI for two decades.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The daughters of a businesswoman who was gunned down look for her killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A woman stands a second trial for killing her husband, claiming it was an accident after the two of them re-enacted a Bugs Bunny cartoon.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Two women fight to keep the man convicted of killing their mother over 20 years earlier in prison, though he maintains his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The case of Shelley Mook, a young mother and Tennessee school teacher who mysteriously vanished after visiting her ex-husband, is examined.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A woman stands a second trial for killing her husband, claiming it was an accident after the two of them re-enacted a Bugs Bunny cartoon.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Two women fight to keep the man convicted of killing their mother over 20 years earlier in prison, though he maintains his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The case of Shelley Mook, a young mother and Tennessee school teacher who mysteriously vanished after visiting her ex-husband, is examined.

programme.title: Accomplice to Murder, With Vinnie Politan
programme.desc: In a case that shocked the nation, a mother and son stand trial for the unthinkable. Shanda Vander Ark, once a promising law clerk, now faces murder charges in the death of her own child. But was her eldest son a willing accomplice?

programme.title: Accomplice to Murder, With Vinnie Politan

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Examining some of the thousands of potentially habitable exoplanets discovered over the past 20 years and whether some of them could be home to intelligent extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: From Egypt to Easter Island, towering figures built by ancient man stand watch over the Earth; are these stone giants simply a testament to humanity's past or could they depict visitors from another world? Experts seek the answers.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: UFOs have been reported at the world's nuclear facilities ever since the first atomic bomb in 1945, with many suspecting that extraterrestrials are watching humanity's nuclear potential.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A shocking study reveals that the original builders of Stonehenge mysteriously vanished; but Stonehenge's mysterious Bluestone circle could have activated a portal that transported the ancient culture back to their former home among the stars.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: In the Mojave Desert, there is a structure built to bestow everlasting life and according to the architect, the blueprint was provided by an extraterrestrial visitor known as the Integratron, could it actually provide the key to immortality.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The White House has consistently denied having any knowledge of alien craft visiting Earth, but presidential encounters with UFOs and other strange phenomena can be found going all the way back to George Washington.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: According to legend, a curse was placed on the tomb of King Tutankhamun; researchers theorize that the curse came about as the result of alien technology with the purpose of protecting the truth about an otherworldly event as well as an alien device.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Humans can survive catastrophic injuries and deadly scenarios that defy the odds in ways that are inexplicable; these survivals challenge the best attempts to explain how anyone could live through such circumstances.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Could a cache of fantastic riches have been buried centuries ago on a tiny island in the North Atlantic?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: King Arthur, England's first pop culture superhero; his exploits inspired blockbuster movies and television series like "Middle Earth", "Harry Potter", "Game of Thrones" and "Star Wars"; the significant impact of Arthurian legend on Western culture.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Whether surviving freezing temperatures, diving unfathomable depths in one breath, or lifting weighty objects, superhuman feats never cease to amaze; pulling them off could be a matter of training, willpower, genetics, or something more mysterious.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: All over the world, there are giant monoliths that ancient ancestors carved out of solid rock.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Throughout history, humans have buried their dead in caves or chambers, in pyramids or in some form of a tomb; ancient tombs were visual memorials for the dead; in China, a vast necropolis was constructed as a way to connect to the afterlife.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: During World War II, a number of persistent mysteries were born, including unexplained stories about everything from lost gold to secret societies and highly advanced technology.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The body of a woman turns up in a field in Huntington Beach, CA, in 1968.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A 23-year-old teacher vanished the evening before Easter after giving confession. Her body was later found floating in a drainage canal.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The longest running cold case of a law enforcement officer in the United States was the murder of Sheriff's Lt. Joe Clark.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 13-year-old Jennifer Bastian is abducted and murdered in August of 1986, residents of Tacoma panic. This is the second young girl killed in five months.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a 30-year-old mother fails to report for duty in Virginia, the Army lists her as AWOL. Her family immediately suspects foul play and embark on a 13-year quest for answers.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 25-year-old school teacher Christy Mirack is found murdered in her apartment in 1992, there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: College student Brad Perry shows up to work his graveyard shift at the gas station and is never seen alive again.

programme.desc: When 13-year-old Jennifer Bastian is abducted and murdered in August of 1986, residents of Tacoma panic. This is the second young girl killed in five months.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade; while one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search for a missing couple holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in Saginaw, Mich., but her family and friends don't believe it; as police dig deep to get to the truth, they discover a shocking secret they never saw coming.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The community of Macon, Ga., is gripped in a wave of terror when a beautiful law student disappears from her apartment complex; the shocking discovery of a body leads investigators uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A jilted lover takes to the internet to stalk her ex and threaten his girlfriend; when she finally follows through on her violent threats, detectives find themselves entangled in a deadly web of deception.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The peaceful town of Mountain City, Tenn., is rocked when a beloved young couple are found brutally murdered in their home; as police search for their killer, they uncover a family enmeshed in sinister secrets and lies.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A sudden illness takes hold of a beloved doctor, leaving her family helpless as the illness takes a fatal turn; the investigation into her death takes her family on a journey into the dark heart of a monster who has been at their side all along.

programme.title: Behind the Headlines

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mother of two mysteriously vanishes from her parents' Michigan home while going to check the mailbox, leaving her phone and identification behind; police declare her dead without discovering a body.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a model and up-and-coming YouTube celebrity turns up dead, police question her husband in the hope he can shed some light on the situation.

programme.desc: A model with a checkered past goes under cover to reveal the truth about a cold case involving a romantic getaway on a boat that ended with a woman being lost at sea.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman accused of attempting to hire a hit man to kill her husband.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Key players in the case of Rod Covlin, a New York man who is found guilty of murdering his wife for her $5.3 million fortune and attempting to frame his then-teenage daughter, share their stories.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A brilliant woman who rose from poverty and became a successful criminal defense attorney is murdered; investigators look into her clients and follow a bizarre string of clues.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Florida father is determined to find out what happened to his daughter after her fatal fall from a penthouse apartment in Belgium.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a graduate student is shot dead outside of her North Carolina home, a 911 caller leads detectives to believe the victim's fiance is the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mother of three married to a missionary is found dead on Valentine's Day; the investigation into the murder reveals answers close to home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Compelling mysteries, powerful documentaries, in-depth investigations.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman goes for a walk during a snowstorm and never returns.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into a newlywed's disappearance focuses on her job as a CIA employee as a possible clue.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The discovery of an Army captain's death in her El Paso, Texas, home shakes her tight-knit military community.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Years after a woman is murdered in the back of her comic book store, new evidence is discovered that sends the investigation in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Leslie Neulander dies after what appears to be an accidental fall in the shower in her New York home, two friends join forces to seek justice on her behalf; insiders speak out on the latest twists and the final chapter in the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A San Diego mother suddenly vanishes in 2014; nearly two years later, her body is found in the San Diego Bay, but medical examiners say she has only been dead for a month or two.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After police discover the burned body of a missing Miami man at the edge of the Florida Everglades, the wife of a local supermarket mogul comes forward to reveal a shocking secret and possible lead.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As actress Aasha Davis' career takes off, her sister and brother-in-law go missing.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.desc: When a complicated Texas love triangle ends in murder, a pink gun leads to an arrest, until new evidence prompts investigators to rethink the case.

programme.title: Hello World
programme.desc: Business journalist Ashlee Vance hosts this series that explores how technology is shaping the future. Each episode focuses on a different country, exploring ways in which the local culture and geography influence the nation's approach to technology. Vance searches for the inventors and scientists behind the innovations to see how they are changing the future. On his journey, Vance finds fresh -- and sometimes weird -- tech creations, including robot exoskeletons and virtual reality characters in New Zealand.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: Financier and philanthropist David Rubenstein talks with his peers -- leaders of some of America's biggest companies -- in this interview show that aims to answer the question of what makes a great leader. Rubenstein uses his chats to explore successful leadership skills through the personal and professional choices made by the business world's most influential people. Rubenstein travels across the country to find out about the business leaders' stories and uncover information about their paths to success. The interview subjects include Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates, Berkshire Hathaway chairman Warren Buffett, and Pepsi CEO Indra Nooyi.

They report the latest business news and speak with the likes of political and business leaders to help investors make investment decisions that build their portfolios.

The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Las viejas del sicario
programme.desc: Una película de acción de narcos.

programme.title: Mariachi gringo
programme.desc: Edward, un apasionado por la música mexicana, se siente atrapado en la rutina de la pequeña ciudad donde reside. Con el propósito de huir de todo, Edward se muda a México para convertirse en un mariachi.

programme.title: Soy de la frontera verde
programme.desc: Don Hugo un poderoso narcotraficante, muere en circunstacias muy extrañas, aunque todo indica que lo envenenaron. Su hija, doña Fernanda Morales, no dejará cabos sueltos y vengará la muerte de su padre encontrando al culpable.

programme.title: Un ángel en peligro
programme.desc: La felicidad de una familia se quiebra cuando secuestran a su hija. Al mismo tiempo, se descubrirá la red de engaños entre su sobrino y su esposa, además de un nexo con un narcotraficante.

programme.title: A ellas les gustan mayores
programme.desc: Ricardo está casado con Miranda, una bella mujer de afortunada posición social. Sin embargo, Ricardo la engaña con una mujer más joven que él.

programme.title: Cigarrito Bañado
programme.desc: Lucio huye de una deuda y de un amigo peligroso. En el camino conoce a Ximena, una mujer que seduce a los hombres y luego les roba el dinero.

programme.title: Cometa
programme.desc: Un chico pierde todas las cosas que lo motivan a vivir. Se ha quedado sin trabajo, casa y familia, pero en su recorrido por las calles se encuentra a Cometa, un perro callejero.

programme.title: Moisés y los diez mandamientos
programme.desc: La historia de Moisés desde su nacimiento y llegada a manos de la princesa Henutmire hasta llevar a su pueblo a la Tierra Prometida. Su crianza como un verdadero príncipe egipcio junto a su tío Ramsés.

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Song-yi cuestiona la necesidad de Min-joon de volver a su planeta. Min-joon, al igual que Song-yi, se siente angustiado ante la perspectiva. Los poderes de Min-joon siguen fallando.

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Min-joon dice que no se irá, pero Song-yi no sabe por qué. Hwi-kyung finalmente confronta a Jae-kyung.

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Song-yi descubre lo que probablemente sucederá si Min-joon se queda en la Tierra. Hwi-kyung y Min-joon intentan obligar a Jae-kyung a entregarse.

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Song-yi insiste en devolver a Min-Joon a su planeta. Cuando va a cenar con la familia de la actriz, la madre de Song-yi descubre que es una extraterrestre.

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Min-joon profesa su amor por Song-yi y luego desaparece. Con el paso del tiempo, Song-yi y otros creen que lo han visto.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Azra le pregunta a Bursa por el anillo de su tía y aprovecha para humillarla buscando en su bolso. Orhan observa las grabaciones de las cámaras de seguridad y ve que Besime y Hazim entraron en su dormitorio para robar el joyero de Azra.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Yesim ve a Cüneyt en una cafetería y hablan sobre el artículo de Melissa. Metin y Mahinur ven a Serkan, el marido de Sermin, en su jardín buscando pruebas. Kadir busca a Yesim en el club, pero se pone celoso al verla con Cüneyt.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Melissa quiere una fiesta de té en casa. Serkan le cuenta a Hazim que una niña vio a Besime hablando por teléfono con Sermin. Melissa y Defne beben alcohol.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Fevzi cree haber encontrado a su hija e intenta acercarse a Melissa. Cüneyt y Mahinur reviven su juventud durante las vacaciones. Melissa y Görkem piensan que Defne oculta algo. Cüneyt debe vender la finca.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Melissa queda devastada al saber que Görkem debe marcharse y confronta a Fevzi. Necati intenta usar a Reyhan para manipular a Cüneyt. Orhan amenaza a Büsra si se atreve a revelar lo que sabe. Mahinur y Metin temen por la seguridad de Melissa.

programme.title: Señora del Destino
programme.desc: María do Carmo es una madre de cinco hijos que triunfó en la vida con mucha lucha y tesón, pero que todavía tendrá una batalla que luchar: obtener el cariño de su hija quien fue secuestrada cuando era una recién nacida.

programme.title: Señora del Destino

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Nazira se presta al juego, anima a Muna, promete enseñarle todo para que Said se quede con ella y se divorcie de Jade, no lo consigue. Leonardo y Cristina hacen el amor, él se siente culpable.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: En un descuido de Said, Jade saca el pasaporte y dinero para irse de Marruecos. Albieri se siente acorralado, habla con Dora y le promete cumplir sus sueños si ella acepta irse a Los Ángeles.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Marisa se sale con la suya y obtiene un supuesto regalo de Leonardo: la joya de Jade; luego se aprovecha para dar de qué hablar a la prensa. Jade cambia de identidad, roba un bolso.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Said le confiesa a Jade que ha tratado de sacarla de su corazón, sin lograrlo. Ella se conmueve, baila la danza del sable y viven una noche de pasión. Lucas se molesta por el collar de Marisa.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Cristina se da cuenta de que se casó con otro solo por darle celos a su ex. Tres años después vuelve a Miami sin un peso y busca a Leonardo. Latiffa está embarazada, Mohamed está feliz.

programme.title: La esclava Isaura
programme.desc: Una historia que se desenvuelve a mediados del siglo XIX en Brasil y relata la vida de Isaura, una esclava mestiza, hija de la esclava del Comendador y el capataz de la hacienda.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: Nelson Counne is accused of defrauding at least a dozen women of over $1.25 million. He promised to pay them back with ten times the amount, but never did. N12 Crime Files confronts him, calling him "The Worst Boyfriend on the Upper Eastside".

programme.title: Crime Files

programme.desc: The holiday season can compound feelings of grief or loneliness. Tonight we talk with those who have experienced those emotions and developed ways to power through.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Grief or tragedy can be difficult to explain. Some believe art can be a healthy way to express feelings that can’t be put into words. Tonight, Nicole Estaphan shares stories of people finding their voices through art including a young woman using dance to deal with her father’s past imprisonment; an artist teaching others to paint through the pain of grief; and music as therapy.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Forget the utensils at home, we’re keeping it casual with finger foods; Burgers, Donuts, and Cupcakes.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: the Chronicle team tonight!) but there’s universal agreement that apples, pumpkins, and cider are the flavors of fall. Tonight we get the story behind the spookily-named Phantom Farms in Cumberland, R.I., and raise a glass of Artifact hard cider. Prefer the smell of fall, rather than the taste? We meet a candle maker in Allston with a line of fall-scented candles. We also sample spirits inspired by cranberry bogs, and Anthony Everett learns the art of pumpkin-decorating from some jack-o-lantern experts.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5

programme.title: LIVE: CityLine
programme.desc: CityLine5 is WCVB's award-winning urban news and feature magazine talk show.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: “Hills, mills, and pork pies.” That’s how one local describes the city of Fall River. But as Erika Tarantal discovers, the Spindle City offers all that and so much more. Erika explores the next-generation market Portugalia, which highlights high-end goods from Portugal. If you think Fall River’s textile industry is a thing of the past, think again – Erika stops by factories taking advantage of the skilled local workforce to produce high-end linens and rugs. Erika meets teens finding community at the Watuppa Rowing Center. And she couldn’t leave town without checking out those pork pies! At Hartley’s, they’ve been using the same recipe for more than 100 years.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: A picture is worth a thousand words, and thanks to technology we all have the ability to capture powerful images. We visit the Griffin Museum of Photography in Winchester to discuss how that’s changing the landscape.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight, we are exploring the world of folk art, from the storied collection at Boston’s Museum of Fine Arts to collectibles crafted by hand in a Sutton studio. We find a treasure trove of historic weathervanes and consult the experts at Skinner on what’s hot. And are tattoos folk art? We’ll have the answer.

programme.title: FIXT
programme.desc: Andrew returned home from serving his country with a toothache so bad he covers his mouth out of habit. Mickey had forgotten how to smile after years of struggle with addiction and abuse. Will the FIXT team help them smile again?

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: A spotlight on Black-owned restaurants, dinner and drinks so good you’ll want to share!

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Fun and fascinating foodie finds tonight (including one for Fido)! Erika Tarantal visits Quite Fetching in Grafton, a specialty bakery that makes special occasion cakes…for dogs. For hungry humans, we visit Nomai in Hingham, the new suburban venture from restaurateur Brian Moy. Ted Reinstein tours the headquarters of Boston Sword & Tuna in the Seaport district, and finds Boston’s working waterfront alive – and evolving. And Octoberfest may be six months away but we get a taste of a German beer hall at Trinktisch in Belmont.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Potato chips, Italian cold cuts, fresh bread, and smoked salmon. Dream menu? Nope, they’re just among the range of tasty stories we bring you tonight. In Gloucester, we meet a mother-daughter team getting buy-in from local consumers by selling them fresh local fish (and cooking it, too).

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: From family businesses to legacy brands and products - we are getting the stories behind them all.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Boston culinary icon Lydia Shire is still cooking, still creating – and still inspiring! Tonight she takes us from Chinatown to Cambridge, exploring the dishes and traditions that fuel her imagination—from roast duck to homemade lemongrass oil.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Great eats on the go. Nicole Estaphan hits the road with New England’s food trucks. Nicole introduces us to the local chefs and builders behind the scenes of these rolling kitchens.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: A spotlight on organizations focused on the Youth.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Beer without the alcohol, sweet treats without the gluten, and “mocktails” for everyone to enjoy – tonight, we begin with a hunt for treats “Free From” allergens and alcohol. Then, at an old-fashioned shop in Wakefield we find dairy-free ice cream with endless flavor options. In New Bedford we visit businesses focused on going waste-free (did you know your mattress can be recycled?). Finally, we meet a local skincare creator looking to keep your body, happy, with products free of artificial… anything!

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Food is expensive. Gas is expensive. Inflation is high, and enthusiasm for spending is down. So what can you do and see in Greater Boston – for FREE? We have ideas. Shayna Seymour shares the perks for anyone celebrating a birthday – free food! Anthony Everett takes a hike with a Boston man who maps walking trails and makes them available for (yes) free. We explore free public art all over Boston. And is your name Isabella? There’s a Boston museum where that will get you in for free.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle has gotten up close and personal with all manner of wildlife over the years. Charlotte the Bubble-Butt Turtle. Schubert the Seal. A trail-hiking rabbit. Baby bears. Tonight we get a little wild and reconnect with these furry friends.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Seafood in South Bay…a “salt cave” in Scituate…and a pickleball lesson for Shayna Seymour. Tonight it’s a sampling of food and fun fit for the weekend! We meet the couples behind The Pearl in Dorchester, check out Nautilus for good eats in the Seaport neighborhood, and join a running club (to work off the fried oysters, naturally). We also meet the creator of Boston-themed baby gifts at Joy Street Kids.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Nicole Estaphan steps aboard the floating lounge Tall Ship in East Boston for beverages and bites. Anthony Everett visits Ribcraft, the Marblehead company that manufactures rigid inflatable boats, and dines aboard the Spirit of Massachusetts floating restaurant which is docked in…Maine? (We’ll explain.) Those and other stories fit for a summer Friday!

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight, suggestions for getting out of the house, day or night. From Italian dining to a local supper club; pizza and bowling; a little retail therapy or just coffee with a friend. Ideas for anything other than hiding out from the snow!

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: School is coming to a close and vacation season is getting underway. Tonight, some ideas to keep the troops entertained! Golf in the city? Shayna Seymour gets some work in on her short game at a high-tech mini golf course, and swings big at an indoor golf course in Boston. Nicole Estaphan does a deep dive into historic video games in Rhode Island, while Erika Tarantal is aiming for the bullseye at a darts emporium. Board games, pinball, and more options to keep everyone active and entertained and now has 50 triathlons under his belt.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Are you ready to get a little bit spooky? We are getting in the mood for Halloween with a little history on how it got to where it is today. We walk you through some haunts in Salem, some well-known, and some not. Salem isn’t the only spot with ghostly ties; we get a tour of some of Boston’s haunted spots, including the Boston Common. Ted Reinstein takes a trip with paranormal investigators aboard an (allegedly) haunted ship in Mystic, Conn. And if you’re in the mood to experience your own Halloween thrills, we visit two local attractions still scaring visitors year after year.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: As temperatures drop, you may be hunting for indoor activities. Pac-Man and pinball enthusiasts, rejoice! In Norwood, a retro video game enthusiast has built his dream business, Hometown Arcade.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: Bringing Down The House: The Bombing of Harvey's Casino
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, two men wheeled what looked like an IBM computer into a Lake Tahoe casino. The events that followed rocked the industry, baffled bomb technicians, and changed the lives of a criminal’s and a casino magnate’s family forever.

programme.title: The Lost Children of Carlisle
programme.desc: A powerful look at the history of Native American boarding schools as told through the stories of tribal members and their surviving family members, who endured an educational system founded on the concept “Kill the Indian in him, and save the man.”

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight we learn about the day jobs of local comedians, from New Hampshire’s Juston McKinney (a onetime sheriff’s deputy in Maine) to a Boston-area comic who helps families plan funerals, and another who is – believe it or not – a taxidermist.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Couldn’t we all use a laugh? Tonight we connect with local comics who find “funny” everywhere they look. We meet up with Worcester teacher-turned-standup Orlando Baxter, and talk to Stephanie Peters, who used laughter to raise funds for the people of Ukraine. We check out a brand new comedy club in Beverly and connect with former Saturday Night Live writer Sam Jay, who reflects on her Dorchester roots. And is it possible to teach funny? At Emerson College, we find out.

programme.title: Get Fixed
programme.desc: Wellness Hour or Get Fixed

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight, Shayna Seymour catches up with AJ Dybantsa. Also, Anthony Everett challenges an 8-year-old national chess champ to a match, while Erika Tarantal takes a lesson from the youngest-ever senior world champion in fencing!

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: When two Northeastern University students felt excluded from an activity they loved they created a welcoming community of their own with Lonely Bones Skate Co., while pastry chef Gloria Cabral has won awards for her own talent but she is most proud of mentoring a new generation of pastry chefs. Tonight’s edition of “Gamechangers” focuses on people who are quietly making a difference right here in our community – from a Dorchester artist creating a new “face” for playing cards to a team making the sport of tennis accessible to all.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight the Chronicle team puts work aside in favor of… play! From drone-racing, to stone-skipping, to card games and more.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: WCVB

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Anthony Everett tours a unique home for sale, where the proceeds are targeted for charity thanks to the wishes of its prominent late owner. We travel to Great Barrington, where a couple has lovingly restored a chapel on the grounds of a former private school, built in memory of three members of the community who died tragically – and now a respite for hikers along the Appalachian Trail. In Concord, Anthony dines at a special cafe staffed by incarcerated individuals who are learning new skills. And in Brighton, we visit a local co-op community that supports young adults who are experiencing homelessness.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle is going a little nutty tonight over NUTS! Cwcashews, almonds, peanuts, even acorns are on the menu. We visit Arcade Snacks in Auburn and Q’s Nuts in Somerville for their veritable nut buffets and choices. We learn about the benefits of acorn flour and how to make it. We are also introduced to high-powered almond butter, courtsy of local Bear Butter and discover how local researchers are trying to tame nut allergies in patients.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Explore Retro pieces from the past; from roller rinks, fabric wrapping paper and typewriters, find out what’s making a comeback.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: The Ground Round, Tech Hi-Fi, Strawberries Records – all popular local brands, all brought back to life with new local ventures. We check them out tonight.

programme.title: Get Fixed
programme.desc: Wellness Hour or Get Fixed

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: It’s New Hampshire’s second-largest county, home to some of its best-known towns, and to famed Franconia Notch. Tonight Ted Reinstein shares the autumn beauty of Grafton County, N.H. He discovers how “The Notch” was once saved from development, and explores scenic views along the Cross-New Hampshire Adventure Trail. Hard to believe it’s been 20 years since the Old Man in the Mountain crumbled; Ted meets the team who designed “profilers” that help simulate the rocky view. And at Polly’s Pancake Parlor, Ted digs into a half-stack and catches up with old friends.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB Chronicle

programme.title: Plate It!
programme.desc: Everybody loves a hearty breakfast for dinner, but will Chef Sean Rumery or Chef Collin Torres most impress the judges with their elevated spin on a classic? Find out on this egg-cellent episode of Plate It!

programme.title: Local Love
programme.desc: Kyle is a Louisville native and real estate agent that is on the market and looking for love. Three single guys will try to sell him a long term relationship by making bourbon, designing hats and taking a trip around the ice rink.

programme.title: Maddy & Dixie Take Sactown
programme.desc: Having a little fun on the town is great but it's even better when you're doing it thriftily. Join Maddy & Dixie as they make a little cash go a long way, seeking out the best activities that’ll have you ballin’ on a budget!

programme.title: Heroes On Call
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.
